pairs.question: Who wrote the song 'For You I Will' by Monica?
pairs.answer: The song 'For You I Will' was written by the American songwriter Diane Warren.

pairs.question: What genre is the song 'For You I Will' classified under?
pairs.answer: 'For You I Will' is classified as a downtempo pop and R&B ballad, characterized by its slow tempo and emotional lyrical themes.

pairs.question: When was 'For You I Will' released as a single and sent to Top 40 radio?
pairs.answer: 'For You I Will' was sent to Top 40 radio on January 14, 1997, and issued on physical formats on February 11, 1997.

pairs.question: What notable achievement did 'For You I Will' accomplish on the US Billboard Hot 100?
pairs.answer: 'For You I Will' debuted impressively on the US Billboard Hot 100 and peaked at number four, becoming Monica's second top five single and one of her highest-charting songs of the 1990s.

pairs.question: How did 'For You I Will' perform internationally?
pairs.answer: Internationally, 'For You I Will' reached the top five in the Netherlands, New Zealand, and on the Canadian Adult Contemporary chart.

pairs.question: What is the lyrical theme of 'For You I Will'?
pairs.answer: The lyrics of 'For You I Will' involve the singer pledging love, devotion, and promising to help an unnamed 'you' overcome any difficulty, regardless of the magnitude.

pairs.question: What certification did 'For You I Will' receive from the RIAA?
pairs.answer: 'For You I Will' was certified platinum by the Recording Industry Association of America (RIAA) on July 2, 1997.
